---
title: "Rural Dataverse Content Network"
description: "Dependency network diagram showing relationships between datasets, packages, projects, charts, resources, and posts"
author: "Mapping & Data Analytics Team"
date: "2026-04-21"
categories: ["Chart", "Network"]
tags: ["graph", "dependencies", "network"]
chart:
  title: "Rural Dataverse Content Network"
  chartType: "network"
  interactive: false
  dataSource: "content/graph.json"
  featured: true
usesDatasets: []
usesPackages: []
producedBy: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: false
---

A network visualization of content relationships in the Rural Dataverse. Nodes
represent content items (datasets, packages, projects, charts, resources, posts)
and edges represent dependency, production, and reference relationships.

```{r}
#| label: dataverse-network
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
#| fig-dpi: 192
#| fig-alt: "Network diagram showing content relationships in the Rural Dataverse"

library(igraph)
library(tidygraph)
library(ggraph)
library(ggplot2)

# Build graph.json from .qmd frontmatter (writes to content/graph.json)
graph <- cori.data.verse::build_graph()

graph_path <- here::here("content", "graph.json")
graph_data <- jsonlite::fromJSON(graph_path)

nodes <- graph_data$nodes
edges <- graph_data$edges

# Filter out dangling edges (source or target not in node list)
valid <- edges$source %in% nodes$id & edges$target %in% nodes$id
edges <- edges[valid, , drop = FALSE]

if (nrow(edges) == 0) {
  plot.new()
  text(0.5, 0.5, "No edges in graph.json.", cex = 1.2, col = "gray40")
} else {
  g <- graph_from_data_frame(
    d        = edges[, c("source", "target", "relation")],
    directed = TRUE,
    vertices = nodes[, c("id", "type", "title")]
  )

  tg <- as_tbl_graph(g)

  type_colors <- c(
    dataset  = "#3B82F6",
    chart    = "#F59E0B",
    package  = "#10B981",
    project  = "#8B5CF6",
    post     = "#9CA3AF",
    resource = "#14B8A6"
  )

  edge_colors <- c(
    depends_on  = "#6B7280",
    produced_by = "#8B5CF6",
    references  = "#9CA3AF"
  )

  ggraph(tg, layout = "fr") +
    geom_edge_link(
      aes(colour = relation),
      arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, "mm"), type = "closed"),
      end_cap = circle(4, "mm"),
      start_cap = circle(4, "mm"),
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_node_point(
      aes(colour = type),
      size = 5
    ) +
    geom_node_text(
      aes(label = title),
      repel = TRUE,
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 20
    ) +
    scale_colour_manual(
      values = type_colors,
      name = "Content Type"
    ) +
    scale_edge_colour_manual(
      values = edge_colors,
      name = "Relation"
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold")
    ) +
    labs(title = "Rural Dataverse Content Network")
}
```
